headline: Wendy’s Vs. McDonald’s: Buy Wendy’s to Ride the ‘Project Fresh’ Short-Squeeze Momentum and Avoid McDonald’s
summary: Wendy's just posted a quarter where beating Wall Street estimates still meant losing customers fast, and yet the stock is surging while McDonald's quietly bleeds year to date. The reason why changes how you should position in fast food right now.
